category_sources: Official CATB project page describes src as Simple Revision Control for single-file solo projects.
source_facts.description says Simple revision control: RCS reloaded with a modern UI.
display_name_sources: Official CATB project page and GitLab repository use the name src.
docs_sources: Official CATB resource page lists src.html, FAQ.html, and INSTALL.html as documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official CATB resource page for src.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/esr/src, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official CATB project page says src is for single-file solo projects and has Subversion/Git/Mercurial-like commands.
source_facts.description identifies revision control and an RCS-like modern UI.
